resources.string: Hides active VPN connection from selected apps — NetworkCapabilities, NetworkInfo, NetworkInterface, LinkProperties, /proc/net

This module is controlled entirely from the LSPosed / Vector manager.

1. Open Vector manager → Modules → enable VPN Hide

2. Set the module scope to the apps you want VPN hidden from

3. Force-stop those apps so they re-fork with hooks active

4. Run adb logcat | grep VpnHide to confirm hooks installed

No in-app configuration is needed — the LSPosed scope is the allowlist.
